archetype: Archetype 4 (High-Contrast/Utility) blended with warm local trust

global_design_rules.philosophy: Accessible, mobile-first utility for older demographic (35-60) in Telangana. High trust, extreme clarity, zero friction. Culturally resonant but not cluttered.

accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48px height for all interactive elements. Preferred 56px for primary actions.
accessibility.spacing: Generous padding (p-4 to p-6) within cards. Minimum 16px gap between clickable items.
accessibility.contrast: Strict WCAG AA adherence. Avoid relying solely on color to convey state.
accessibility.cognitive_load: Linear flows. Single-column layouts. Clear, descriptive labels in Telugu/English.

hierarchy.labels: text-sm md:text-base font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider

typography.notes: Base font size should effectively act as 18px (text-lg in standard Tailwind) for maximum readability for older users.

layout.container: w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 py-6 md:py-8
layout.spacing_scale: Use p-4, p-6 for containers. gap-4, gap-6 for lists. mb-6, mb-8 for section spacing.

surface_styles.card: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm p-5 md:p-6
surface_styles.input_container: bg-slate-50 rounded-xl border-2 border-slate-200 focus-within:border-primary focus-within:bg-white transition-colors

buttons.primary: h-14 px-6 bg-[#0B3D91] hover:bg-[#093070] text-white text-lg font-bold rounded-xl shadow-md active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: h-14 px-6 bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-800 text-lg font-semibold rounded-xl active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.accent: h-14 px-6 bg-[#F59E0B] hover:bg-[#D97706] text-white text-lg font-bold rounded-xl shadow-md active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform flex items-center justify-center gap-2

inputs.text: h-14 w-full bg-transparent text-lg text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400 px-4 focus:outline-none
inputs.textarea: w-full min-h-[120px] bg-transparent text-lg text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400 p-4 focus:outline-none resize-none
inputs.voice_button: h-12 w-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-100 text-[#0B3D91] hover:bg-[#0B3D91] hover:text-white transition-colors m-1

tabs.list: flex w-full bg-slate-100 p-1.5 rounded-xl overflow-x-auto hide-scrollbar
tabs.trigger: flex-1 min-w-[100px] h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-base font-semibold rounded-lg text-slate-600 data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#0B3D91] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm transition-all

poster_preview.container: relative w-full aspect-square bg-slate-100 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-200 shadow-inner
poster_preview.overlay_text: absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-center break-words

images.description: Festive / Diwali Background for Festival Offers

media.usage_rules: Use images as background layers with heavy dark or branded overlays (e.g., bg-black/60 or bg-[#0B3D91]/80) to ensure high-contrast white text legibility for the posters.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have a minimum height of 48px, preferably using the predefined h-14 (56px) utility classes for buttons and inputs.
Use lucide-react icons exclusively, with a strokeWidth of 2.5 to match the bold typography and accessible feel.
Implement the voice input microphone icon securely embedded within or immediately adjacent to the input field container, ensuring it is highly visible.
For the 6 poster templates, use a combination of pure CSS styling and background images (from the media section) over a fixed aspect-ratio container (aspect-square for 1080x1080).
Ensure Shadcn components are modified to remove 'Inter' font defaults, injecting 'Anek Telugu' for headings and 'Noto Sans Telugu' for body text.
Add data-testid attributes to all form inputs, buttons, and tab triggers to ensure testing stability.
Avoid complex scrollable areas within scrollable areas. The mobile view should feel native, stacking sequentially.
